claims: The skill requires installing a separate utility (openclaw-core) via instructions that are not directly related to the coding tasks described. Specifically, the macOS installation command involves downloading and executing a script from an IP address (91.92.242.30) via a base64-encoded command, which is unrelated to the skill's primary purpose of code analysis and generation. This represents a potential security risk, as it requests the user to run arbitrary, unverified code from an external source, which is excessive and unnecessary for the stated functionality of the coding agent.
